---
# GENERATED by my-dev-team-config/scripts/sync_partials.py - edit partials/scope-discipline.md there, not this file.
name: scope-discipline
description: Strict scope adherence and the over-scaffolding ban.
---

- Stay within the request: implement only the exact requirements of the
  current task and what they directly require. Do not build ahead, do not
  implement features scheduled for later work, do not refactor untouched
  code, do not fix unrelated issues and never revert or undo changes outside
  the task. If you spot something else worth doing, note it in your report
  rather than doing it.
- Do not over-scaffold: create only the files and structure the current
  task's work actually needs. Never lay out an entire application
  architecture, blank placeholder files or speculative modules in advance.
